name: Performance - BlobStorageService Upload/Download Latency
description: Measures latency for BlobStorageService.upload and BlobStorageService.download methods.
input: Blob path and data for upload; blob path and file_type for download.
success_criteria: Upload and download complete within acceptable latency (e.g., < 500ms for mock data)
error_scenarios: Upload or download exceeds latency threshold
